startUrls.title: AliExpress Product URLs
startUrls.description: List of AliExpress product URLs or product IDs to extract. Supports full URLs and numeric IDs.

maxItems.title: Maximum items
maxItems.description: Maximum number of products to extract

extendOutputFunction.title: Extend output function
extendOutputFunction.description: Optional JavaScript function to extend output. Receives product as argument.

includeRawData.title: Include raw discovery data
includeRawData.description: If true, includes raw collected sources for debugging

confidenceThreshold.title: Confidence threshold
confidenceThreshold.description: Minimum confidence (0-1) for fields to be included in final output. Lower values include more but less reliable data.
